# pm-agent

> Generated by pm-agent on 2026-03-15

---

## Purpose
An AI-powered learning platform that allows users to interact with language models and analyze repositories.

## Goals
- Provide a user-friendly interface for interacting with language models.
- Enable users to analyze codebases, understand their structure, and gain insights.

## Stack
Python, OpenAI/Anthropic/Ollama LLMs, Git

## Architecture
The system consists of a main application that handles user interactions with language models and an indexer that analyzes repositories.

## Design Decisions
| Question | Decision / Answer | Date |
|---|---|---|
| What are the specific reasons why OpenAI/Anthropic/Ollama LLMs were chosen over other AI models? |  | 2026-03-15 |
| Can you explain the trade-offs involved in selecting Git as a repository analysis tool instead of using another version control system like Mercurial or SVN? |  | 2026-03-15 |
| What constraints have been imposed on the project regarding the size and type of repositories that can be indexed by the indexer component? |  | 2026-03-15 |
| What are some future plans for enhancing the learning platform, considering the limitations of the current architecture and technology stack? |  | 2026-03-15 |
| How has the project team decided to balance scalability with performance, especially given the high volume of user interactions and repository analysis tasks? |  | 2026-03-15 |
| Manual entry |  | 2026-03-15 |
